LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM WAGE GARNISHMENT IS GRANTED IN PART. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL PAY $100.00 PER MONTH, TO BE WITHDRAWN FROM THE DEBTOR'S FIRST PAY CHECK EACH MONTH. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ALL FUNDS HELD, EXCEPT $100.00, TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED AND MAILED TO PARTIES. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert F. Cohen, Attorney at Law, Tel. 800.492.2657, specially appearing for plaintiffs;
Prinya Witayanonta, in pro per, Tel. 415. 509.8823, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: Defendant's claim of exemption from wage garnishment is granted in part. Judgment debtor shall pay $100.00 per month, to be withdrawn from the debtor's first pay check each month. The levying officer is directed to release all funds held, except $100.00, to judgment debtor. Order signed and mailed to parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
